description_long: This bungalow features a prominent, steeply pitched gable roof with a central peak and wide overhangs, constructed primarily from dark roofing material. The structure is set on a rectangular base with a raised front porch, accessible by a set of steps, and is surrounded by a mix of open and semi-enclosed spaces. The exterior walls appear to be a combination of light-colored masonry and wood, with visible support beams and framework adding architectural detail. Large windows are distributed along the sides, providing ample natural light, while the front facade is defined by a covered porch area and a central entrance. The rear and side elevations reveal additional outdoor spaces and structural elements, such as railings and partial fencing. The overall design suggests a modern interpretation of a classic bungalow, blending traditional forms with contemporary materials.
description: A modern bungalow with a steep gable roof, raised front porch, and a mix of masonry and wood exterior. Large windows and open spaces define its contemporary yet classic style.
description_view_0: The rear view highlights the solid base, partial fencing, and the back side of the gable roof.
description_view_1: The front view showcases the wide steps, covered porch, and central entrance beneath the prominent gable roof.
description_view_2: The left side view reveals the extended roof overhang, grouped windows, and side outdoor space.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the porch extension, additional railings, and the symmetry of the roof structure.
